creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Please defer to the questions mailinglist or the -net mailinglist (both 
findable on http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/) for questions 
like these (and/or look in the various release notes findable on the 
website, for example http://www.freebsd.org/releases/6.2R/). Closing the 
Problem Record since this is not a problem but a question.
